description: Characterize the sky background level and source-detection threshold for the HST WFPC2 image ~/AstroImages/raw/hst_wfpc2_sample.fits in AstroImageJ. The analysis must include the average background level (mean of medians) and average RMS noise (mean of standard deviations) derived from at least four blank-sky regions (30x30 to 60x60 pixels each). Calculate the 3-sigma and 5-sigma detection thresholds, as well as the Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) of the brightest star in the image using the formula SNR = (peak - background) / RMS. Save the background level, RMS noise, thresholds, and the brightest star's SNR to ~/AstroImages/measurements/sky_background_report.txt according to the format specifications.
